actions.expression: new Promise((resolve) => { let n=0; const tick=()=>{ window.scrollBy(0,700); n++; if(n<10) setTimeout(tick,500); else resolve(Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('ytd-comments, #comments, ytd-comment-simplebox-renderer, #placeholder-area, #contenteditable-root, [contenteditable=true], textarea, button, [role=button]')).slice(0,160).map((el)=>{ const r=el.getBoundingClientRect(); return {tag:el.tagName,id:el.id,role:el.getAttribute('role'),aria:el.getAttribute('aria-label'),text:(el.innerText||el.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim().slice(0,100),rect:{w:Math.round(r.width),h:Math.round(r.height),x:Math.round(r.x),y:Math.round(r.y)}}}).filter(x=>x.rect.w>0&&x.rect.h>0)); }; tick(); })
